description: Session counts and average session duration (Standard report). active_devices is the closest proxy to Daily Active Users. Ref: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/analytics-reports/app-sessions

date.description: Date on which the sessions occurred. For weekly/monthly instances, the first day of that week/month

app_name.description: Name of the app provided during setup in App Store Connect

source_type.description: Where the user originally discovered your app. Values: App Store Browse, App Store Search, App Referrer, Web Referrer, Unavailable

device.description: Device type: iPhone, iPad, Desktop, Apple TV, Apple Vision

territory.description: App Store country or region where sessions occurred (ISO country code)

platform_version.description: OS version of the device on which sessions occurred

sessions.description: Total number of times the app was opened during the period, from opted-in users

active_devices.description: Number of unique devices with at least one session — closest proxy to Daily Active Users (DAU)

average_session_duration.description: Average duration of sessions in seconds during the period

synced_at.description: Timestamp when Airbyte synced this record (metadata)
